summary: Iteration 143 — In-Charge 'Done' workflow + Phase 4 Step 2 imaging/photos. Backend: 7/7 pytest pass — POST /api/uploads/media-temp (PNG happy path, .exe rejected with 400, nurse 403); POST /api/procedures/{id}/stage2/prosthetic/step2 validates full-arch OPG missing (400 'OPG ...required'), non-full-arch IOPA missing (400 'IOPA missing for tooth positions'), <2 prosthesis_photos (400 'At least 2 final prosthesis photos are required'), and happy path persists phase4_step2_opg_upload + phase4_step2_prosthesis_photos + phase4_step2_data with status pending_final_delivery (verified via GET). Frontend BLOCKER FIXED: submit-phase2/[id].tsx had a stray '</TouchableOpacity></View>' pair (lines 942-943) left over from a previous edit which produced a Metro SyntaxError ('Expected corresponding JSX closing tag for <ScrollView>') and crashed the entire app on every route. I removed those two orphan tags and the bundle compiles. Phase 4 Step 2 page now renders correctly: Trial & Delivery checklist, Post-Delivery imaging block, default photo slots labelled 'Frontal view'/'Occlusal view', Add-another-photo button (testID=photo-add-slot-btn) all visible. The new submit-phase4-step2/[id].tsx correctly uses RN-Web `testID` everywhere — those selectors ARE present in DOM. Could not fully exercise In-Charge 'Done' click → success-card flow because Playwright's session storage isn't persisting the access_token after click on the Login button (post-login URL stays at /auth/login, GET /procedures returns 403); however source review confirms isInchargeSelfCreated logic, doneCompleted state, post-submit POST /procedures/{id}/approve calls, and success-card with 'Treatment Marked Complete' / testID=phase4-step2-go-to-case all in place across the five files.

ui_bugs.issue: Orphan </TouchableOpacity></View> pair after the doneCompleted ternary block caused Metro SyntaxError 'Expected corresponding JSX closing tag for <ScrollView>' at line 942 — bundle-wide failure (all routes showed Server Error overlay). FIXED in this iteration (removed the two stray tags). Re-bundle succeeded.

Same RN-Web testability bug as iteration 142 still present in these files: many newly added `data-testid="..."` props sit on RN <TouchableOpacity>/<TextInput>/<View> components and are silently dropped by RN-Web (only camelCase `testID` is forwarded). Examples still on disk: data-testid='phase2-submit-btn' (line 932), 'phase2-student-notes' (line 900), 'phase3-request-edit-btn' (lines 254, 272), 'p3-iopa-slot-{idx}', 'isq-slot-{idx}', 'copy-mua-to-notes-btn', 'phase4-step1-notes', 'phase4-step1-submit', 'delete-draft-btn', 'step2-implant-selection-view', 'calendar-trigger', etc. NOTE: submit-phase4-step2/[id].tsx is the one file in this iteration that consistently uses `testID` correctly — its testIDs (phase4-step2-submit, photo-add-slot-btn, photo-row-0/1, phase4-step2-imaging-section, phase4-step2-photos-section, phase4-step2-go-to-case) ARE present in DOM (confirmed by Playwright query_selector).

action_items: FRONTEND TESTABILITY (HIGH, carry-over from iter142): replace `data-testid="..."` with `testID="..."` on all RN components in submit-phase2/[id].tsx, submit-stage2-surgical/[id].tsx, submit-stage2-prosthetic/[id].tsx, and (tabs)/new-procedure.tsx. RN-Web only auto-converts camelCase `testID` -> DOM `data-testid`; raw `data-testid` is dropped on RN wrappers. submit-phase4-step2/[id].tsx is the reference for the correct pattern.

DATA CLEANUP (LOW): backend test class synthetically mutates one procedure to status 'stage2_prosthetic_step1_approved' for the validation suite and leaves it in that state on completion (procedure 699fbfa15279dfa7819789b8). If desired, restore its previous status via mongo update; otherwise harmless for further test runs.
critical_code_review_comments: BACKEND: Phase4Step2Submit + submit_phase4_step2 are clean — full-arch detection via FULL_ARCH_TYPES set, per-position IOPA validation lists missing teeth in the error message, photos filtered before persistence. Notification fan-out to supervisor + incharge looks fine. Suggestion: log the rejected requests (currently 400 with no audit log).
BACKEND: media-temp endpoint is concise & correct — nurse 403, ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS check, MAX_FILE_SIZE limit, uuid filename. Returns the documented {filename, original_name, content_type} contract.

FRONTEND: isInchargeSelfCreated logic is consistent across all five files (`user.role==='implant_incharge' && createdByRole==='implant_incharge' && user.id===createdById`). Auto-approve POST after submit is wrapped in try{}catch{} so a failed approve will silently swallow — consider surfacing a toast when the auto-approve call fails, otherwise the user thinks the case is 'Done' when it's still pending approval.

FRONTEND: submit-phase4-step2/[id].tsx is well-structured (525 lines, single concern). Imaging section gates on isFullArch correctly; photo slots default labels seeded; add/remove handlers maintain index parity with labels.

FRONTEND CRITICAL FIXED THIS ITERATION: stray closing tags in submit-phase2/[id].tsx — main agent should scan the other phase forms (submit-stage2-surgical, submit-stage2-prosthetic, new-procedure) for similar leftovers from the doneCompleted refactor. I checked submit-phase4-step2 and it's clean.
updated_files: /app/frontend/app/procedures/submit-phase2/[id].tsx (removed stray </TouchableOpacity></View> at lines 942-943 to unblock Metro bundling)

success_rate.frontend: 70% (Phase 4 Step 2 page renders correctly; In-Charge 'Done' button text not runtime-verified due to Playwright session-token loss; testability bug carry-over)

test_credentials: Used /app/memory/test_credentials.md — Abhijit.patil/Admin@123 (implant_incharge), Gaurav.pandey/Student@123 (student), Paresh.gandhi/Supervisor@123 (supervisor). All login OK via REST. Playwright web login flow appears flaky (post-login URL stays /auth/login on this preview; subsequent /api/procedures returns 403). Not a regression from this iteration — same behaviour observed in earlier sessions.
seed_data_creation: Backend test mutated existing procedure 699fbfa15279dfa7819789b8 to status 'stage2_prosthetic_step1_approved' and toggles implant_procedure_type between 'All on 4' (full-arch) and 'Single' (non-full-arch) inside the test methods. After the suite, the proc is left in stage2_prosthetic_step1_approved with type 'All on 4' and 3 implant_plans. No new users / cases were created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression for iteration 143 lives at /app/backend/tests/test_phase4_step2_iter143.py — keep running it. The data-testid -> testID prop swap remains an open carry-over from iteration 142; once main agent makes that edit on the four files listed in action_items, re-run the In-Charge 'Done' UI flow on a fresh session: login as Abhijit.patil, open /procedures/submit-phase4-step2/<incharge-self-created-step1-approved-case>, fill checklist + 2 photos + OPG, click submit, expect success-card with 'Treatment Marked Complete' headline + testID=phase4-step2-go-to-case. To create such a case for the InCharge user (currently DB has no in-charge self-created case in step1_approved status), the easiest path is mongo: db.procedures.updateOne({_id: ObjectId('69cfb0cea19e1d1819e0f734')}, {$set: {status:'stage2_prosthetic_step1_approved', implant_procedure_type:'All on 4', implant_plans:[{position:'14',brand:'X',system:'Y',diameter:4,length:10}]}}).
rca_of_the_issue:
RCA — Phase 2 form Server Error: submit-phase2/[id].tsx had this trailing block after the `{doneCompleted ? <success-card> : <submit-button>}` ternary:
  ...
  </View>
  )}
    </TouchableOpacity>   <-- orphan, no opening tag
  </View>                <-- orphan, closes nothing
  </ScrollView>
  </KeyboardAvoidingView>
The two extra closing tags came from the prior structure where the submit button was wrapped inside an outer <View><TouchableOpacity>...</TouchableOpacity></View>; when the ternary refactor moved the button into its own branch, the closers were not removed. Babel parsed </TouchableOpacity> as the would-be close of <ScrollView> -> SyntaxError. Reproduction: open /procedures/submit-phase2/<id> -> Server Error overlay with stack pointing to 942:13. Fix applied: deleted the two orphan lines (942 and 943). Verified Metro bundle now succeeds. RCA — backend Phase 4 Step 2 status 'stage2_prosthetic_step1_approved': there were no procedures in this status in the DB; the test class auto-promotes one and uses it (cleanup keeps it in that state).
